description: Daily motivational quotes for agentsHQ and The Forge 2.0. Rotates by day-of-year mod count. Curated for Boubacar Barry: stoics, builders, war strategists, sales truth-tellers, athletes, HR/OD leaders, African luminaries, French-language quotes. No political or offensive content.

quotes.text: Do the work. Especially when you don't feel like it.
quotes.author: Steven Pressfield

quotes.text: Vision without execution is hallucination.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.text: You don't rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems.
quotes.author: James Clear

quotes.text: Move fast. The market is not waiting for you.
quotes.author: Reid Hoffman

quotes.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.text: It ain't about how hard you hit. It's about how hard you can get hit and keep moving forward.
quotes.author: Rocky Balboa

quotes.text: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
quotes.author: Wayne Gretzky (via Michael Scott)

quotes.text: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.text: Either you run the day or the day runs you.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: Chinese Proverb

quotes.text: I am not a product of my circumstances. I am a product of my decisions.
quotes.author: Stephen Covey

quotes.text: Revenue is oxygen. Everything else is decoration.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.text: If you're going through hell, keep going.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: Work like there is someone working 24 hours a day to take it away from you.
quotes.author: Mark Cuban

quotes.text: Be so good they can't ignore you.
quotes.author: Steve Martin

quotes.text: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
quotes.author: Sam Levenson

quotes.text: In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Excellence is never an accident.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: You can't build a reputation on what you are going to do.
quotes.author: Henry Ford

quotes.text: Trying is the first step towards failure.
quotes.author: Homer Simpson

quotes.text: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
quotes.author: John Johnson

quotes.text: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: Done is better than perfect.
quotes.author: Sheryl Sandberg

quotes.text: Your most unhappy customers are your greatest source of learning.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.text: I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: People who are crazy enough to think they can change the world are the ones who do.
quotes.author: Rob Siltanen

quotes.text: How you do anything is how you do everything.
quotes.author: Martha Beck

quotes.text: Waste no more time arguing what a good man should be. Be one.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text: The quality of a person's life is in direct proportion to their commitment to excellence.
quotes.author: Vince Lombardi

quotes.text: You have power over your mind, not outside events. Realize this and you will find strength.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text: A ship in harbor is safe, but that is not what ships are for.
quotes.author: John A. Shedd

quotes.text: The cave you fear to enter holds the treasure you seek.
quotes.author: Joseph Campbell

quotes.text: Make your move before you're ready.
quotes.author: Shonda Rhimes

quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
quotes.author: Chris Grosser

quotes.text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: The harder I work, the luckier I get.
quotes.author: Samuel Goldwyn

quotes.text: If you want to go fast, go alone. If you want to go far, go together.
quotes.author: African Proverb

quotes.text: Champions aren't made in gyms. Champions are made from something deep inside -- a desire, a dream, a vision.
quotes.author: Muhammad Ali

quotes.text: I can accept failure. Everyone fails at something. But I can't accept not trying.
quotes.author: Michael Jordan

quotes.text: The function of leadership is to produce more leaders, not more followers.
quotes.author: Ralph Nader

quotes.text: Leadership is not about being in charge. It's about taking care of those in your charge.
quotes.author: Simon Sinek

quotes.text: The greatest danger for most of us is not that our aim is too high and we miss it, but that it is too low and we reach it.
quotes.author: Michelangelo

quotes.text: A good plan, violently executed now, is better than a perfect plan next week.
quotes.author: George S. Patton

quotes.text: Strategy without tactics is the slowest route to victory. Tactics without strategy is the noise before defeat.
quotes.author: Sun Tzu

quotes.text: Victorious warriors win first and then go to war. Defeated warriors go to war first and then seek to win.
quotes.author: Sun Tzu

quotes.text: The key is not to prioritize what's on your schedule, but to schedule your priorities.
quotes.author: Stephen Covey

quotes.text: Management is doing things right; leadership is doing the right things.
quotes.author: Peter Drucker

quotes.text: Culture eats strategy for breakfast.
quotes.author: Peter Drucker

quotes.text: Vulnerability is not weakness. It is our greatest measure of courage.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Sell or be sold. There is no middle ground.
quotes.author: Grant Cardone

quotes.text: People don't buy what you do; they buy why you do it.
quotes.author: Simon Sinek

quotes.text: Every morning in Africa, a gazelle wakes up. It knows it must run faster than the fastest lion or it will be killed. Every morning a lion wakes up. When the sun comes up, you'd better be running.
quotes.author: African Proverb

quotes.text: Until the lion learns to write, every story will glorify the hunter.
quotes.author: African Proverb

quotes.text: However long the night, the dawn will break.
quotes.author: African Proverb

quotes.text: He who learns, teaches.
quotes.author: Ethiopian Proverb

quotes.text: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.text: Our greatest glory is not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: The man who has no imagination has no wings.
quotes.author: Muhammad Ali

quotes.text: Mamba mentality is about 4am workouts, doing more than the next guy, and wanting it more.
quotes.author: Kobe Bryant

quotes.text: Everything negative -- pressure, challenges -- is all an opportunity for me to rise.
quotes.author: Kobe Bryant

quotes.text: I fear not the man who has practiced 10,000 kicks once, but I fear the man who has practiced one kick 10,000 times.
quotes.author: Bruce Lee

quotes.text: Absorb what is useful, discard what is not, add what is uniquely your own.
quotes.author: Bruce Lee

quotes.text: Get busy living, or get busy dying.
quotes.author: Andy Dufresne, The Shawshank Redemption

quotes.text: To infinity and beyond.
quotes.author: Buzz Lightyear, Toy Story

quotes.text: With great power comes great responsibility.
quotes.author: Uncle Ben, Spider-Man

quotes.text: Excellence is the next five minutes. Excellence is this phone call. Excellence is this meeting.
quotes.author: Tom Peters

quotes.text: If you are not embarrassed by the first version of your product, you've launched too late.
quotes.author: Reid Hoffman

quotes.text: I never dreamed about success. I worked for it.
quotes.author: Estee Lauder

quotes.text: Doubt kills more dreams than failure ever will.
quotes.author: Suzy Kassem

quotes.text: Chase the vision, not the money. The money will end up following you.
quotes.author: Tony Hsieh

quotes.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
quotes.author: Walt Disney

quotes.text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: Suffer the pain of discipline or suffer the pain of regret.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: Limits, like fears, are often just an illusion.
quotes.author: Michael Jordan

quotes.text: The secret of success is to do the common thing uncommonly well.
quotes.author: John D. Rockefeller Jr.

quotes.text: L'homme qui travaille et qui pense construit son destin. L'homme qui attend le subis.
quotes.author: Sekou Toure, Premier President de la Guinee

quotes.text: La dignite d'un peuple ne se mesure pas a ses ressources naturelles, mais a la force de caractere de ses hommes.
quotes.author: Sekou Toure, Premier President de la Guinee

quotes.text: Notre liberte n'a pas de prix. Et nous la defenderons avec tout ce que nous sommes.
quotes.author: Sekou Toure, Premier President de la Guinee

quotes.text: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: After climbing a great hill, one only finds that there are many more hills to climb.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: L'Afrique doit s'unir.
quotes.author: Kwame Nkrumah, Ghana

quotes.text: Seek ye first the political kingdom and all other things shall be added unto you.
quotes.author: Kwame Nkrumah

quotes.text: We must unite now or perish. For Africa, unity is not a luxury -- it is a necessity.
quotes.author: Kwame Nkrumah

quotes.text: I am not an Athenian or a Greek, but a citizen of the world.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.text: Le succes, c'est aller d'echec en echec sans perdre son enthousiasme.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill (traduit)

quotes.text: La plus grande gloire n'est pas de ne jamais tomber, mais de se relever a chaque chute.
quotes.author: Confucius (traduit)

quotes.text: Ce que tu fais parle si fort que je n'entends pas ce que tu dis.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson (traduit)

quotes.text: Celui qui deplace une montagne commence par deplacer de petites pierres.
quotes.author: Confucius (traduit)

quotes.text: The most important thing in communication is hearing what isn't said.
quotes.author: Peter Drucker

quotes.text: Rain does not fall on one roof alone.
quotes.author: Cameroonian Proverb

quotes.text: A river that forgets its source will dry up.
quotes.author: Yoruba Proverb, West Africa

quotes.text: However long the night, the dawn will break.
quotes.author: Guinean Proverb

quotes.text: Suffer the pain of discipline or suffer the pain of regret.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: Nous preferons la pauvrete dans la liberte a la richesse dans l'esclavage.
quotes.author: Sekou Toure, discours du 25 aout 1958

quotes.text: The task ahead of us is never as great as the power behind us.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: We are all capable of achieving great things. The question is whether we are willing to do the work.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison (attributed)
